title: OssVerifiedPredicate
description: in-toto predicate emitted by the oss-verify CLI and signed via Sigstore. See SPEC.md §5. The predicate type URI is https://oss-verified.better-internet.org/predicate/v1.

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA being attested. Lowercase hex, length 40 (SHA-1) or 64 (SHA-256). Schema currently constrains to 40; extend when the toolchain migrates.

repo_url.description: Canonical clone URL of the repository, normalised (no trailing .git, https scheme). MUST match the OIDC subject claim of the signing CI.

default_branch.description: Name of the default branch at attestation time (e.g. 'main').

osi_response_hash.description: sha256 of the JSON response from the OSI license API queried at attestation time.

sbom_uri.description: Optional URI where the SBOM is published. Verifiers may fetch and re-hash to confirm sbom_hash.

exemptions.description: Maintainer-declared exemptions from .oss-verified.toml, recorded verbatim. Surfaced on the verify page; reviewers and end users may challenge them.

passes.description: Number of independent LLM calls. Phase 1 may be 1; Phase 2 mandates 3 with strict-majority voting.

model_id.description: Stable model identifier from packages/spec/models.json. Verifiers MUST cross-reference against the allowlist version that was current at attested_at.

prompt_hash.description: sha256 of the canonicalised LLM audit prompt template + the data-envelope wrapper, excluding the repo content itself.

cli_version.description: Semantic version of the oss-verify CLI binary that produced this predicate.

cli_sha.description: sha256 of the CLI binary. Verifiers cross-check against published release artefacts.

attested_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which the CLI emitted the predicate. Informational only; the binding time is the Rekor inclusion timestamp.

details.description: Optional human-readable detail. Verifiers MUST treat the boolean as binding; details are surface-area only.
